introSection: Requin Express’ is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Preston & Barbieri currently located at Cita-Parc in Lille, Hauts-de-France, France.
fullText: Requin Express’ is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Preston & Barbieri currently located at Cita-Parc in Lille, Hauts-de-France, France.
